what: Baseline Functions for Actigraphy and Activity Processsing and Analysis
title: Baseline Functions for Actigraphy and Activity Processsing and Analysis
text: actibase baseline package raw actigraphy activity workflows. provides readers core preprocessing helpers downstream packages can build , step-count summarization overlays.

title: Baseline Functions for Actigraphy and Activity Processsing and Analysis
text: can install actibase GitHub :

title: Baseline Functions for Actigraphy and Activity Processsing and Analysis
code: library(actibase) res = acti_standardize_data(acti_raw_data) resampled = acti_resample(res, sample_rate = 30L)

title: Baseline Functions for Actigraphy and Activity Processsing and Analysis
text: actibase keeps primitives packages can build : standardization reshaping helpers resampling Higher-level summarization, step-count mapping, downstream analysis live overlay packages.

text: Example Actigraphy/Activity Raw Data

text: data.frame columns time time column X X-axis column Y Y-axis column Z Z-axis column

what: Resample 3-axial input signal to a specific sampling rate — acti_resample
title: Resample 3-axial input signal to a specific sampling rate — acti_resample
text: Resample 3-axial input signal specific sampling rate

title: Resample 3-axial input signal to a specific sampling rate — acti_resample
code: acti_resample(data, sample_rate, method = "linear", ...)  acti_resample_to_time(data, times, method = "linear", ...)

title: Resample 3-axial input signal to a specific sampling rate — acti_resample
text: data `data.frame` column time `POSIXct` (usually `time`), `X`, `Y`, `Z` sample_rate sampling frequency, coercible integer. sampling rate sampling data **. method method interpolation. Options `"linear"/"constant"`, uses `stats::approx`, one `"fmm", "periodic", "natural", "monoH.FC", "hyman"`, uses `stats::spline` ... additional arguments pass [stats::approx()] [stats::spline] times vector `POSIXct` date/time values interpolate data

title: Resample 3-axial input signal to a specific sampling rate — acti_resample
text: `data.frame`/`tibble` `time` `X`, `Y`, `Z`.

title: Resample 3-axial input signal to a specific sampling rate — acti_resample
code: old = options(digits.secs = 3) x = acti_raw_data res = acti_resample(data = x, sample_rate = 80) res = acti_resample(data = x, sample_rate = 100) res = acti_resample(data = x, sample_rate = 1) res = acti_resample_to_time(   data = x,   times = lubridate::floor_date(x$time, unit = "1 sec"), ) res_nat = acti_resample_to_time(   data = x,   times = lubridate::floor_date(x$time, unit = "1 sec"),   method = "natural" ) options(old)

text: Create Day-Level Inclusion information

text: data `data.frame` columns `time` min_required Number minutes required day called `included` ... arguments pass [create_day_inclusion] using [add_day_inclusion]

title: Create Day-Level Inclusion information — create_day_inclusion
text: `data.frame` day information number minutes observed included

title: Create Day-Level Inclusion information — create_day_inclusion
code: data = acti_raw_data |>   dplyr::mutate(r = sqrt(X^2 + Y^2 + Z^2),                 time = lubridate::floor_date(time, "1 minute")) |>   dplyr::group_by(time) |>   dplyr::summarise(r = sum(r), .groups = "drop") |>   dplyr::mutate(wear = r > 4000)  res = create_day_inclusion(data)

title: Flag Quality Control Values — flag_qc
text: Flag Quality Control Values

title: Flag Quality Control Values — flag_qc
code: flag_qc(   df,   dynamic_range = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   flags = c("all", "spike", "interval_jump", "spike_second", "same_value",     "device_limit", "all_zero", "impossible") )  flag_qc_all(   df,   dynamic_range = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   flags = c("all", "spike", "interval_jump", "spike_second", "same_value",     "device_limit", "all_zero", "impossible") )

title: Flag Quality Control Values — flag_qc
text: df data set actigraphy dynamic_range dynamic range device, used find device limit. verbose print diagnostic messages flags flags run QC.  set "", flags run, default.

title: Flag Quality Control Values — flag_qc
text: data set `flags` column (`flag_qc`) number columns starting `flag_*` (`flag_qc_all`)

title: Flag Quality Control Values — flag_qc
code: res = acti_raw_data out = flag_qc(res) #> Flagging Spikes #> Flagging Interval Jumps #> Flagging Spikes at Second-level #> Flagging Repeated Values #> Flagging Device Limit Values #> Warning: No dynamic range found in header, using data estimate #> Flagging Zero Values #> Flagging 'Impossible' Values

title: Flag Spikes — flag_spike
text: Flag Spikes

title: Flag Spikes — flag_spike
code: flag_spike(df, spike_size = 11)  flag_interval_jump(df, verbose = FALSE)  flag_spike_second(df, spike_size = 11)  flag_device_limit(df, dynamic_range = NULL, epsilon = 0.05)  flag_contiguous_device_limit(df, dynamic_range = NULL, epsilon = 0.05)  flag_same_value(df, min_length = 1)  flag_all_zero(df, min_length = 3)  flag_impossible(df, min_length = 6)

title: Flag Spikes — flag_spike
text: https://wwwn.cdc.gov/Nchs/Nhanes/2011-2012/PAXMIN_G.htm

title: Flag Spikes — flag_spike
text: df data set actigraphy spike_size size "spike" - absolute difference contiguous observations single axis verbose print diagnostic messages dynamic_range dynamic range device, used find device limit. epsilon small adjustment values within device limit, minus epsilon, still flagged hitting limit. example, `dynamic_range = c(-6, 6)` `epsilon = 0.05`, value <= `-5.95` `>= 5.95` gravity units flagged min_length minimum length condition contiguous samples.  `min_length = 3`, least 3 `TRUE`s row required, stretches single `TRUE` values 2 `TRUE` followed `FALSE`, set `FALSE`.

title: Flag Spikes — flag_spike
text: data set back

title: Flag Spikes — flag_spike
text: `flag_spike` looks 2 contiguous values, within axis, larger absolute size (`11` gravity units).  `flag_spike_second` function groups data second, finds range values, within axis, determines range greater specified size (`11` g).

title: Flag Spikes — flag_spike
code: res = acti_raw_data res = flag_spike(res) res = flag_interval_jump(res) res = flag_spike_second(res) res = flag_same_value(res) res = flag_device_limit(res) #> Warning: No dynamic range found in header, using data estimate res = flag_all_zero(res) res = flag_impossible(res)
